posts.text: OpenAI just released a new model that might replace junior developers.
Bitcoin hits a new all-time high amid regulatory ETF approvals.
FAA approves Starship for Mars-bound test launches next quarter.
Federal Reserve raises rates 75bps, S&P drops 3% intraday.
Meta lays off 15,000 engineers to fund AI research division.
New study links heavy smartphone use to teen depression and anxiety.
EU passes strict AI Act with steep fines for non-compliance.
Renewable energy is now cheaper than coal in most markets globally.
Tesla recalls 2 million vehicles for autopilot software fix.
Wage growth lags inflation for the eighteenth straight month.
Apple Vision Pro flops, division shut down after dismal sales.
Hospital ER wait times hit record highs as system buckles.
JP Morgan launches stablecoin for institutional clients.
Latest Marvel movie breaks opening-weekend box office records.
ChatGPT now generates working SaaS startups from a single prompt.
Norway's wealth fund divests from oil majors over climate risk.
Boring Company hits 1 km/hr in latest tunnel test, Musk celebrates.
Local park converted to luxury condos, longtime residents protest.
Quant fund Renaissance Technologies posts record year for Medallion.
Major hospital system hit by ransomware, surgeries delayed.
Bitcoin mining banned in three more US states over energy use.
Tesla robotaxi service launches commercially in Austin this week.
Senate passes bipartisan bill capping monthly insulin prices.
Sam Altman raises $7T to build new AI chip fabrication plants.
